'''Vojak''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], whose brother was [[Assassin/Legends|assassinated]] by the [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]], [[C-3PX]], on [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]]. After chasing C-3PX down on [[Hosk Station/Legends|Hosk Station]] in an attempt to repay the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] for what he had done, Vojak was dispatched with a shot from the rear of C-3PX's head, effectively disintegrating the avenger.

{{Char-stub}}
